response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and 20 years of development experience, he lacks the critical required qualifications for this role. Most critically, there is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency—a hard requirement. Additionally, his background is predominantly in web and full-stack development, with minimal embedded C/UNIX systems experience and zero demonstrated expertise in embedded security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption protocols, switch networking). The role requires domain-specific security and networking knowledge that is largely absent from his resume.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (20 years) across multiple platforms and paradigms, demonstrating strong technical fundamentals and adaptability
Proven expertise in software craftsmanship, CI/CD infrastructure, and system-level work (GitLab administration, deployment servers, infrastructure setup)
Some C/C++ experience from National Instruments role and demonstrated ability to work with low-level systems (robotic arms, real-time applications with DLang)
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is an explicit hard requirement for this role
Career trajectory heavily weighted toward web and full-stack development; limited recent embedded systems or Linux kernel-level work
Complete absence of embedded security domain expertise (no MACsec, 802.1X, encryption protocols, device authentication, or network switch security experience)

key_factors.factor: No embedded security or networking domain expertise
Limited recent embedded C/UNIX development experience
